title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Omni Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Omni Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Omni Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Omni Logistics India:
Omni Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Omni Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
